payload.text:
https://thiran.sece.ac.in/"

build a clone of this !! but in the cyber punk green and black theme

**Defining the Project Scope**

Okay, so I'm envisioning a clone of the Thiran website, but with a sleek Cyberpunk Green and Black design. This will be for a technical symposium at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. I see the main "Hero" section as a key component for this initial version.


**Mapping Out the Website Structure**

I've been drilling down on the website's structure. I'm prioritizing the inclusion of sections like "About," "Events," "Schedule," and "Contact". I am thinking about how to integrate visual elements such as the logo, title, and dates into the design. I will focus on a grid-based layout with animations and vibrant colors. I'm leaning toward a deep black primary background with neon and matrix green accents.


**Integrating Visual and Interactive Elements**

I'm now integrating several visual and interactive elements. I'm focusing on components like "Sponsors," "Footer" with contact and links, and I'm exploring the potential of using the Gemini service for an AI assistant or event details generator. I'm visualizing a "Hero Section" with a glitchy "THIRAN" title and animated background, with event cards incorporating hover effects. Using Tailwind's group-hover is a great idea. Plus, I want custom scrollbars and a sticky header for better UX. I'm also addressing the data issue with mock event data for categories and using Gemini for generated cyberpunk descriptions for "Deep Dive" buttons.


**Planning the Implementation Phase**

Okay, the project is officially getting underway. I've got the basic file structure mapped out now: `index.html`, `index.tsx`, `App.tsx`, and component files for the Navbar, Hero, About, Events, Stats, and Footer, alongside types and constants. I'm making sure to include "Thiran 2024" branding. I'm focusing on the Cyberpunk look, with a `bg-[#050505]` background, `text-[#00ff41]` text, and borders with `border-[#00ff41]/30` as well as glowing `shadow-[#00ff41]`. Let's get coding!

Main HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS and Google Fonts.

diffs.replacement:
import { EventItem, NavItem, Stats } from './types';

export const NAV_ITEMS: NavItem[] = [
  { label: 'HOME', href: '#home' },
  { label: 'ABOUT', href: '#about' },
  { label: 'EVENTS', href: '#events' },
  { label: 'SCHEDULE', href: '#schedule' },
  { label: 'GALLERY', href: '#gallery' },
  { label: 'CONTACT', href: '#contact' },
];

export const EVENTS: EventItem[] = [
  {
    id: '1',
    title: 'CODE CONQUEST',
    category: 'Technical',
    description: 'Solve complex algorithmic puzzles in this high-stakes competitive coding arena.',
    prize: '₹ 10,000',
    teamSize: '1-2 Members',
    image: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/code/600/400',
  },
  {
    id: '2',
    title: 'AI OLYMPIAD',
    category: 'Technical',
    description: 'Build predictive models and neural networks to tackle real-world data challenges.',
    prize: '₹ 15,000',
    teamSize: '3 Members',
    image: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/ai/600/400',
  },
  {
    id: '3',
    title: 'CYBER ESCAPE',
    category: 'Non-Technical',
    description: 'A physical and digital scavenger hunt hidden within the campus corridors.',
    prize: '₹ 5,000',
    teamSize: '4 Members',
    image: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/cyber/600/400',
  },
  {
    id: '4',
    title: 'QUANTUM WORKSHOP',
    category: 'Workshop',
    description: 'Hands-on session on quantum computing fundamentals and Qiskit framework.',
    teamSize: 'Individual',
    image: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/quantum/600/400',
  },
  {
    id: '5',
    title: 'ROBO-WRESTLE',
    category: 'Premium',
    description: 'The ultimate bot-vs-bot combat. Only one machine stands tall.',
    prize: '₹ 25,000',
    teamSize: '2-4 Members',
    image: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/robot/600/400',
  },
  {
    id: '6',
    title: 'UI/UX FRONTIER',
    category: 'Technical',
    description: 'Design the future of human-machine interaction in this 6-hour sprint.',
    prize: '₹ 8,000',
    teamSize: '2 Members',
    image: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/design/600/400',
  },
];

export const STATS: Stats[] = [
  { label: 'PARTICIPANTS', value: '5000+' },
  { label: 'EVENTS', value: '45+' },
  { label: 'COLLEGES', value: '150+' },
  { label: 'PRIZE POOL', value: '₹ 5L+' },
];

import React from 'react'; const About: React.FC = () => { return (

THE MANIFESTO

THIRAN is more than just a symposium; it is a nexus where technology meets creativity, and ideas morph into innovation. Hosted annually by Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, it has evolved into a premier state-level platform.

With over 45+ events spanning across Engineering, Design, and Management, THIRAN challenges the brightest minds to push beyond the conventional.

SECE HQ
